caption: A video game capture of a football game takes place on a green field with white yard markers, featuring players in white and dark uniforms. The game interface at the top displays "ULTIMATE TEAM," "1st & 10," and a game clock at "1:52" and later "1:51," with a score of "0" for the team with a red and black logo. A small inset window in the lower left shows a man with blond hair wearing a dark blue shirt, observing the gameplay. On the field, a player in a dark uniform runs toward the right, while several players in white uniforms pursue him. A green circle highlighting a player is visible on the turf. As the action progresses, the player in the dark uniform is tackled by two players in white uniforms near the 30-yard line, as indicated by the "PositivePay" logo on the field.
